description: A vertical, portrait-orientation slogan graphic. The background is a color photograph of a historic urban residential street: a row of red-brick townhouses with black shutters and window boxes with greenery and ivy, black gas lampposts, an American flag mounted and hanging from a pole on a building at right, and a cobblestone street receding into the distance; a small pumpkin sits on a stoop. Overlaid across the lower portion in white cursive/script type is text on two lines: 'Restoring the American Dream.' There is no agency seal on the image itself.
